LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.0.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.0.description: I am the recipient of the Great Commendation.
LanguageData.VFEE_FirstOfName.stages.0.label: First of {OTHERPAWN_possessive} Name
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.0.label: Great honor
LanguageData.VFEE_Chosen.stages.0.label: Chosen
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleBall.stages.0.label: terrible ball
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleBall.stages.0.description: I'm embarrassed to be a part of that train wreck. I just hope no one gossips about this.
LanguageData.VFEE_BoringBall.stages.0.label: boring ball
LanguageData.VFEE_BoringBall.stages.0.description: I was expecting a grand time. What I got was seriously lacking.
LanguageData.VFEE_EnjoyableBall.stages.0.label: enjoyable ball
LanguageData.VFEE_EnjoyableBall.stages.0.description: I had a great time dancing in that ball!
LanguageData.VFEE_AmazingBall.stages.0.label: amazing ball
LanguageData.VFEE_AmazingBall.stages.0.description: I had such an amazing time at that ball. It was everything I imagined and more!
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.0.label: terrible exhibit
LanguageData.VFEE_BoringExhibit.stages.0.label: boring exhibit
LanguageData.VFEE_BoringExhibit.stages.0.description: I was expecting a a lot more interesting pieces, and better presentation.
LanguageData.VFEE_EnjoyableExhibit.stages.0.label: enjoyable exhibit
LanguageData.VFEE_EnjoyableExhibit.stages.0.descripti: It was really interesting seeing our collection displayed like this. Was a great time!
LanguageData.VFEE_AmazingExhibit.stages.0.label: amazing exhibit
LanguageData.VFEE_AmazingExhibit.stages.0.description: I couldn't believe art I've seen many times could still be so fascinating, and the visiting officials were just as engaging.
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleNoBallroom.stages.0.label: no ballroom
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleNoBallroom.stages.0.descriptio: What is a senior official without a ballroom?
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleNoGallery.stages.0.label: no gallery
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleNoGallery.stages.0.description: What is a senior official without a proper gallery?
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleBallroomRequirementsNotMet.sta: I am {TITLE_indefinite} and I should have these items in my ballroom:\n\n{0}
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleGalleryRequirementsNotMet.stag: I am {TITLE_indefinite} and I should have these items in my gallery:\n\n{0}
LanguageData.VFEE_LackingNobleCourt.stages.0.label: lacking cabinet
LanguageData.VFEE_LackingNobleCourt.stages.0.descript: My cabinet is lacking. My rank's formal requirements should always be respected. I expect to be surrounded by: \n\n{0}
LanguageData.VFEE_BadVisit.stages.0.label: terrible visit
LanguageData.VFEE_BadVisit.stages.0.description: I had a terrible time with that host.
